page_metadata.biotools__summary: ontoFAST is an R package for interactive and semi-automatic annotation of characters with biological ontologies. ontoFAST aids annotating characters and character matrices with biological ontologies.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ontoFAST is an R package for interactive and semi-automatic annotation of characters with biological ontologies. ontoFAST aids annotating characters and character matrices with biological ontologies.
